title: portulaca cuneifolia
intro: Portulaca cuneifolia, also known as the wedge-leaf purslane, is a species of flowering plant in the purslane family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Portulaca cuneifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Portulaca cuneifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or salves to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
